full_description: DailyWater is a hydration reminder app designed to encourage users to drink enough water throughout the day. The app allows you to track your water intake, set customizable goals based on your individual needs, and receive reminders to ensure you stay on track. With DailyWater, you can monitor your progress, receive motivational messages, and develop a healthy hydration habit. The app is easy to use and provides a simple, intuitive interface to log your water intake. Set your daily water goal, track your progress, and receive reminders to drink more water throughout the day. Download DailyWater now and start drinking your way to better health!
